release_notes:
- Added dark mode / light mode toggle button
- Removed Write BD button — all write operations are now through Write Device Info
- Removed Read Version button — version is now read automatically with Read Device Info
- Version number now displayed in the Device Info section
- Activate and Deactivate buttons are disabled until device info is read
- Removed unused byte 4 row from PSkey299 tab
- Single shared progress bar for burn and coredump operations
- Improved window resizing support for laptop and large screens
- Added scrolling to Device tab and PSkey299 tab to prevent clipping on small screens
